chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR. Criminal Transfer Application No. S- 26 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on MA No.432/2023 (Ex) 3. For orders on MA No.433/2024 (561-A) 4. For hearing of main case. 12.02.2024. Syed Ali Murtaza Shah, Advocate for the applicant..-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the applicant under instructions does not press this Criminal Transfer Application, which is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. J U D G E Irfan/PA
